title: Jain's Desserts
description: Adds a bunch of random desserts to Minecraft!
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/818/35/jainsdessertscollage.png "Tiramisu gallery") ## General Info We all love the Vanilla cake, but let's face it; it can get boring *really* fast. This mod aims to fix that by adding in more random desserts and pastries! Some desserts are even from foreign or international countries, adding some extra flavor to the mod. Below is a list of all of the desserts, all of which can be found in the `Food and Drink` creative tab: ### Carrot Cake - 3 slices - 3 hunger bars/slice - Speed I for 8 seconds/slice ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/818/34/carrotcake.png "Carrot Cake") ### Chocolate Cake - 6 slices - 3 hunger bars/slice - Speed I for 8 seconds/slice ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/818/33/chocolatecake.png "Chocolate Cake") ### Large Cake - 7 slices - 4 hunger bars/slice ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/818/32/largecake.png "Large Cake") ### Banana Cream Pie - 4 slices - 2 hunger bars/slice ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/847751/description_5bb351ab-41db-465a-b6f7-c63a9617d60d.png "Banana Cream Pie") ### Sweet Berry Pie - 4 slices - 2 hunger bars/slice ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/818/31/sweetberrypie.png "Sweet Berry Pie") ### Tiramisu - 6 slices - 3 hunger bars/slice - Speed I for 8 seconds/slice ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/818/30/tiramisu.png "Tiramisu") There are also 7 item desserts. See the `Images` section of this mod for the crafting recipes. Can you get them all? **Note:** This mod requires Fabric API. Would you like to receive updates on my projects, or report any feedback? Join my Discord server! ## Links Discord server: https://discord.gg/699VdZwrD8
GitHub: https://github.com/SirJain0/JainsDesserts
